title: GitHub Posture Collector Output
description: Security posture metrics for a GitHub organization

schema_version.description: Schema version for this output format. Audit and internal fields are optional and additive.

collected_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the data was collected

collected_at_level.description: The collection level this artifact was gathered at. trust = org-level aggregates only; audit = per-repo configs + member/repo inventories + alert counts; internal = per-user activity, findings inventories, and the audit-log slice. Levels are cumulative.

include_patterns.description: Glob patterns for repositories to include

exclude_patterns.description: Glob patterns for repositories to exclude

repositories_coverage.description: Percentage of organization repositories covered by the assessment

branch_protection_coverage.description: Percentage of repositories with branch protection enabled

security_features_coverage.description: Average coverage across all 5 security features

access_control.description: Organization-level access control settings. Note: SSO status is not included because GitHub does not provide a reliable API to detect SAML SSO configuration.

two_factor_required.description: Whether 2FA is required for all organization members. Null if insufficient permissions to determine.

default_repository_permission.description: Audit level and above. Org-wide base permission granted to members (read/triage/write/admin/none).

members_can_create_repositories.description: Audit level and above. Whether members can create repositories.

branch_protection_rules.description: Per-rule coverage percentages for branch protection

pull_request_required.description: Percentage of repositories requiring pull requests

approving_reviews.description: Percentage of repositories requiring approving reviews

dismiss_stale_reviews.description: Percentage of repositories that dismiss stale reviews

code_owner_reviews.description: Percentage of repositories requiring code owner reviews

status_checks.description: Percentage of repositories requiring status checks

signed_commits.description: Percentage of repositories requiring signed commits

admin_enforcement.description: Percentage of repositories enforcing rules on admins

security_features.description: Per-feature coverage percentages for security features

vulnerability_alerts.description: Percentage of repositories with vulnerability alerts enabled

code_scanning.description: Percentage of repositories with code scanning enabled

secret_scanning.description: Percentage of repositories with secret scanning enabled

secret_scanning_push_protection.description: Percentage of repositories with secret scanning push protection enabled

dependabot_security_updates.description: Percentage of repositories with Dependabot security updates enabled

per_repo.description: Audit level and above. Per-repo security-feature flags plus open-alert counts by type.

findings.description: Internal level only. Open secret-scanning, code-scanning, and Dependabot alert inventories (no secret values, no CVE description text). Capped at 5,000 per type per repo with a truncation flag.

members.description: Audit level and above. Org member inventory: counts plus per-member login/role at audit; per-member 2FA-enabled flag and last-activity (from the audit log) at internal. Capped at 10,000 members.

repositories.description: Audit level and above. Repository inventory: counts/visibility split plus per-repo metadata and default-branch protection detail at audit; description/topics/license/stargazers at internal. Capped at 5,000 repos.

codeowners.description: Audit level and above. Per-repo CODEOWNERS presence and path at audit; SHA-256 content hash at internal. File contents are never emitted.

webhooks.description: Audit level and above. Org and repo webhook counts and by-event breakdown at audit; per-hook rows (URL host only, never path/query/secret) at internal.

deploy_keys.description: Audit level and above. Per-repo deploy-key counts at audit; per-key rows with public-key fingerprint (never the key) at internal.

actions.description: Audit level and above. Self-hosted runner and org Actions-secret counts at audit; per-runner rows and secret names (never values) at internal.

audit_log.description: Internal level (counts at audit). Security-relevant org audit-log events over a 7-day window. GitHub Enterprise Cloud only; degrades to a diagnostic warning otherwise. Capped at 5,000 events.

apps.description: Audit level and above. GitHub Apps installed in the org: count and per-installation permissions summary at audit; timestamps, repo selection, and subscribed events at internal.

tokens.description: Audit level and above. Fine-grained PAT grants: count at audit; per-token owner/name/permissions/last-used/expiration at internal (never token values). Requires a fine-grained-token policy; degrades to a diagnostic otherwise.

diagnostics.description: Permission errors and feature-unavailable warnings encountered during collection. A surface that hits a permission denial or a missing org feature is skipped (its field omitted) and explained here.
